title: Timestamp arithmetic very slow (especially on Windows)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE times (t TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, id INT PRIMARY KEY);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM times A JOIN times B ON A.t <> B.t WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, B.t, A.t) <> 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM times WHERE t IS NULL OR t > '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
key_bug_features: Timestamp arithmetic performance issue on Windows
